macro.title: Live Updates: Iran war pushes oil prices to 4-year high as Hegseth set to face fresh round of questioning - CBS News
macro.summary: Oil prices hit a 4-year high as Axios reports Trump will hear new options to try to break the Strait of Hormuz standoff with Iran with a new wave of attacks.
